microsoft_ft: Owned **end-to-end execution** of Azure's recovery validation program, scaling from a 2-person operation to a platformized system sustaining 45+ annual resilience drills and driving **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise partners including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 delivery** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and shifted execution to a scalable, repeatable model across multi-team workstreams.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in **4 months** at a 94% recovery rate — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation standard across infrastructure teams.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, maintaining a single source of truth for status, risks, and decisions throughout.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, restructuring cross-functional planning cycles to cut cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21% — eliminating context-switching toil for senior engineers.

Established and enforced cross-functional decision reviews and dependency tracking forums, ensuring alignment across engineering, infrastructure, security, and partner teams and driving **stalled initiatives to completion** against committed milestones.
microsoft_2023: Drove **AI program adoption** for code-generation workflows across Azure, conducting structured demos and training that activated 14 key engineering teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly** without requiring senior engineers to manage rollout.

Translated user research into **roadmap action** by facilitating 11+ interviews with Azure service teams, identifying critical feature gaps and influencing prioritization to add intent-based YAML generation to the product backlog.

Established metadata standards and migrated documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, reducing lookup time by 83% and creating a single source of truth for agentic workflow references across product and engineering teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, securing commitment across 140+ teams through structured decision reviews and dependency sequencing.

Translated discovery with 20+ service teams into a structured execution plan, surfacing **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch and building a roadmap with clear milestones and measurable outcomes to automate critical-path operations.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership real-time visibility into automation gaps and enabling data-driven prioritization of high-impact workstreams across the organization.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and maintaining a structured execution plan with clear milestones visible to all stakeholders.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies — sprint planning, backlog grooming, and retrospectives — resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process by enforcing sequencing discipline and closing open action items each sprint.

Aligned IT, Operations, and Engineering teams to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and removing a recurring blocker that had stalled cross-team shipping commitments.
pro_painters: Increased **job bookings by 26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, building a CRM-driven process that enforced accountability and eliminated execution gaps across sales and operations.

Cut Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing the website and Google profile with structured A/B testing to drive measurable, outcome-tracked improvements.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying margin leaks and delivering a structured findings report that directly informed pricing model updates.

tailoring_notes: 'single source of truth' (JD phrase) woven into microsoft_ft bullet#4 and amazon_robotics bullet#1 to mirror Brex's operational rigor language directly.
'end-to-end execution' (JD phrase) used in microsoft_ft bullet#1 title framing and pro_painters bullet#1 to reflect the JD's 'drive end-to-end execution' responsibility.
'stalled initiatives to completion' (JD phrase) embedded in microsoft_ft bullet#6 to directly echo the JD line 'driving stalled work to completion.'
'AI agent' (JD domain — agentic AI) surfaced in microsoft_ft bullet#5 to satisfy the bonus requirement for shipping AI/agentic products and align with Brex's AI Engineering focus.

'decision reviews' and 'dependency sequencing' (JD vocabulary) placed in microsoft_ft bullet#6 and microsoft_2022 bullet#1 to mirror the JD's 'lead cross-functional forums and decision reviews' and 'dependencies' requirements.
